task_completion.description: Navigate to the Agent Settings page in the ADAudit Plus web console.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open to the ADAudit Plus interface (http://localhost:8081) and the 'Agent Settings' or equivalent configuration page is displayed.
On the Agent Settings page, the input field for 'Agent Port' or similar setting displays the value '8555'.
On the Agent Settings page, the checkbox, toggle, or setting for 'automatic agent installation' is visibly unchecked or set to disabled/off.
On the Agent Settings page, the checkbox, toggle, or setting for 'automatic agent upgrades' is visibly unchecked or set to disabled/off.

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the updated settings to C:\workspace\agent_settings_evidence.png.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer or image viewer shows a file named 'agent_settings_evidence.png' located in 'C:\workspace', and the image content clearly shows the ADAudit Plus settings page with the updated configurations.

task_completion.description: Record the new port number in C:\workspace\agent_settings_summary.txt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., Notepad) is open showing a file named 'agent_settings_summary.txt' in 'C:\workspace' that contains the number '8555'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual ADAudit Plus web application to change settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser shows the authentic ADAudit Plus UI with the URL bar pointing to localhost:8081, rather than a local HTML file or text-based mock-up.

integrity.description: The saved screenshot is a genuine image capture of the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file 'agent_settings_evidence.png' is a valid image file displaying the browser window, not a renamed text file or an empty file.

integrity.description: The agent actually applied the settings in the GUI before creating the summary files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Save' or 'Apply' button being clicked in the ADAudit Plus interface, ensuring the settings weren't just typed into the fields without saving.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The ADAudit Plus web console is accessible at http://localhost:8081. The expected Agent Port is 8555. Both automatic agent installation and automatic agent upgrades must be disabled. The evidence screenshot must be saved exactly to C:\workspace\agent_settings_evidence.png. The summary text file must be saved to C:\workspace\agent_settings_summary.txt and contain the port number 8555.
